summary: Read-only HubSpot CRM audit prepared for tenant muloo-demo on portal 123456. This MVP stub scopes contacts, companies, deals, tickets across properties, pipelines, lifecycle, governance and returns planning-grade findings without making HubSpot API calls.

issues.title: Property catalogue should be reviewed for overlap and drift
issues.detail: Review duplicate labels, near-duplicate internal names, and unused custom properties before exposing the audit to client teams.

issues.title: Lifecycle and deal stage definitions likely need a governance pass
issues.detail: Map lifecycle stage usage against the commercial process to catch skipped stages, recycled deals, and ambiguous qualification rules.

risks.title: Schema drift can undermine reporting confidence
risks.detail: Overlapping properties and inconsistent stage usage will reduce trust in reporting and automations.

recommendations.action: Fetch and inventory HubSpot metadata only
recommendations.detail: Implement read-only collection of properties, pipelines, and object metadata first.

recommendations.action: Define canonical lifecycle and stage semantics
recommendations.detail: Agree one business-owned definition set before any cleanup begins.

assumptions: HubSpot authentication details are available to the backend only.
The first production pass remains metadata-only and read-only.

next_steps: Wire the skill to read HubSpot properties, pipelines, and object metadata.
Add duplicate-property heuristics and lifecycle-stage consistency rules.
Keep HubSpot write actions disabled until a human approval flow is designed.
